name: Barbell Back Squat
form_cues: Bar on upper traps (high bar) or rear delts (low bar) — pick one and stick with it
Brace core hard, take a big breath before descent
Knees track over toes, full depth (hip crease below knee)
Drive through mid-foot, hips and chest rise together
notes: PF Minneapolis: use the squat rack with safety pins set at low-squat depth as a fail-safe. Start light to re-baseline.
video_id_query: Barbell back squat how to proper form Athlean-X
instructions: Set the bar in a power rack at about mid-chest height. Load to working weight; clip safety pins just below depth.
Step under the bar, place it on your upper traps (high bar) or rear delts (low bar). Hands just wider than shoulder width.
Brace your core, unrack by extending the knees and hips, take two steps back into a stable stance with feet shoulder-width and toes slightly out.
Inhale, sit hips back and down, keep chest up and the bar over mid-foot. Descend until hip crease passes knee.
Drive through the mid-foot, push the floor away, exhale at the top. Keep the bar path vertical.
Repeat for the prescribed reps; re-rack carefully when finished.
